description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Specific Targets CI that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master that affect specific files. Use a job named GCC 4.8 running in an ubuntu-latest container based on ubuntu:18.04 with GCC 4.8 and G++ 4.8. Install dependencies, check out the repository, install CMake 3.26.3, configure and build the project, and run tests with specific settings.
